instruction: Fix normalize_label(value) to return lowercase ASCII alphanumeric words separated by one underscore. Treat runs of whitespace, underscores, or hyphens as separators, remove other punctuation, collapse separators, and strip separators from both ends.
acceptance_criteria: normalize_label lowercases ASCII letters and preserves digits
normalize_label collapses whitespace, underscore, and hyphen separator runs
normalize_label strips edge separators and handles punctuation-only input

verifiers.name: case-and-digits
verifiers.criterion: normalize_label lowercases ASCII letters and preserves digits

verifiers.name: separator-runs
verifiers.criterion: normalize_label collapses whitespace, underscore, and hyphen separator runs

verifiers.name: edges
verifiers.criterion: normalize_label strips edge separators and handles punctuation-only input
